# Category: Track Changes

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:START -->
## What’s in this folder

This folder contains **Aspose.Words** examples related to **Track Changes**. Each example is a standalone `.cs` file.

## Files

- `track-changes-in-a-document-by-checking-if-a-docx-file-contains-any-re.cs`
- `track-changes-in-a-document-by-identifying-revision-types-in-a-docx-fi.cs`
- `track-changes-in-a-document-by-managing-and-storing-revisions-in-a-doc.cs`
- `track-changes-in-a-document-by-retrieving-all-revisions-from-a-docx-fi.cs`
- `track-changes-in-a-document-by-starting-revision-tracking-on-a-docx-fi.cs`
- `track-changes-in-a-document-by-stopping-revision-tracking-on-a-docx-fi.cs`

## How to build

From the repo root:

```bash
dotnet restore
dotnet build
```

**Run ID:** `20260304_194552_899ff2`
